# theme-toy

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Interactive theme-customizer toy on the public site: a preset switcher that restyles a sample app vignette live via locally-scoped CSS variables (no config writes, no persistence).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Website.Section` "Theme demo" → `ThemeToySection`
  - Uses: `apps/website/shell.Website`, `primitives/css/badge.Badge`, `primitives/css/card.Card`, `primitives/css/cluster.Cluster`, `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/surface.Surface`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/toggle-chip.SegmentedControl`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`, `ui/theme-engine.GlobalPresetContribution`, `ui/theme-engine.ThemeEngine`, `ui/theme-engine.ThemeScope`, `ui/theme-engine.useResolvedColorMode`, `ui/theme-engine.useTokenGroupPresets`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
